# FigureS

A simple drawing app customized for figure skating. Draw clusters and ice dance patterns, annotate them with text, and export them as SVGs to share with others. Try it [here](https://figures.angelazheng.ca/)!

**FigureS:** short for Figure Skating, inspired by [compulsory figures](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Compulsory_figures), and a nod to the possibilities of scientific figures generated by this tool.

## Example

A turn cluster is a consecutive sequence of turns between forward and backward skating, done on one foot.

![Example](./src/assets/example.svg)

The labels use [Skate Canada](https://skatecanada.ca/)'s standard notation for ice dance.

This turn sequence represents:

- Right forward inside bracket
- Left backward outside step
- Cross forward right backward inside rocker
- Right forward inside to outside change of edge
- Right forward outside three turn
